The family Celastraceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. The species Feuilleea mathewsii is native to Australia, where it can be found growing in a variety of habitats. Further classification of Feuilleea mathewsii includes its kingdom as Plantae.
